title: WELLNESS ON WHEELS VAN - 211info
text: CENTER 50+ WELLNESS ON WHEELS VAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides front porch visits and mobile wellness services including fitness, information and referral for food resources, activities, lifelong learning instruction, social check-ins, technology tutoring, and mobility and wellness programming. 2615 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Age 50 and older, who have limited access to programs, activities, and services and want to remain connected to others Hours: Monday-Friday by appointment only Email (503) 588-6303 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (503) 588-6303 Marilyn Daily [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request a van visit, email, or visit website for more information. FEES: None. Donations accepted. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Keizer and Salem TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on Portland Road (Highway 99) at the intersection of Silverton Road, Highland Street, and Brooks Avenue in Northeast Salem. Services: Computer Literacy Training Programs Continuing Education Friendly Outreach Programs Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion * Older Adults Specialized Information and Referral * Hunger/Food Issues * Older Adults Wellness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FIX-IT BRIGADE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OUTREACH PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RESPITE CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER 50+
